facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 5,866 reviews. On a massage spa in Phu Quoc.

YUJU SPA Phu Quoc on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is not flying under the radar. Nearly 6,000 people rated it and almost all of them gave it five stars. That kind of consistency is rare anywhere, let alone on a beach island.

Book ahead. This one fills up fast.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
